title: 24.7 — Calling inherited functions and overriding behavior

content.text: By putting the using-declarationusing Base::print;insideDerived, we are telling the compiler that allBasefunctions namedprintshould be visible inDerived, which will cause them to be eligible for overload resolution. As a result,Base::print(int)is selected overDerived::print(double).Next lesson24.8Hiding inherited functionalityBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson24.6Adding new functionality to a derived class
